channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Joel Embiid struck in face fighting for rebound, ruled out for rest of 76ers' game against Pacers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid left the Philadelphia 76ers' loss to the Indiana Pacers shortly before halftime Friday night after being struck in the face going for a defensive rebound.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA Cup semifinal matchups in Las Vegas: Thunder-Rockets, Bucks-Hawks
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Winning the NBA Cup won't bring a championship parade to Oklahoma City or Houston or Atlanta or Milwaukee. There's a trophy. There's some cash. There are bragging rights. And that's about it. The way the final four teams in the tournament see things, that's enough.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trae Young, Hawks hoping to win big in Vegas at the NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Trae Young might be the NBA's biggest enigma. Young's fans can point to numbers and say he's an elite player. His detractors can point to numbers and say he's overrated. Both arguments have validity. To some, his cocky ways are endearing. To others, they're infuriating.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cubs acquire All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have acquired All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros, paying a big price for one of baseball’s best hitters.
item.dc:creator: Jay Cohen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 49ers to sever ties with De’Vondre Campbell after Thursday night walkout
item.description: Linebacker De'Vondre Campbell's refusal to play in the 49ers' loss Thursday night will result in his termination from the team, coach Kyle Shanahan said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets legend Nick Mangold criticizes government officials for lack of answers in NJ drone sightings
item.description: New York Jets legend Nick Mangold expressed his frustrations with the lack of answers from government officials regarding the drone sightings over New Jersey on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Woman who falsely accused Duke lacrosse players of rape in 2006 publicly admits she lied
item.description: The woman who in 2006 falsely accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her has admitted publicly for the first time that she made up the story.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: JD Vance confirms Daniel Penny will attend Army-Navy game after acquittal in subway chokehold trial
item.description: Vice President-elect JD Vance confirmed reports Friday that Daniel Penny has accepted his invitation to attend the annual Army-Navy game in Maryland on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark White privilege comment sparks intense, personal argument between Riley Gaines and Jemele Hill
item.description: Riley Gaines' latest online spat with a left-leaning figure came against journalist Jemele Hill regarding Caitlin Clark's recent 'White privilege' comments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Olympic athlete amateur world champion joins Jake Paul's boxing promotion
item.description: Jake Paul's Most Valuable Promotions announced it has added Olympian and amateur world champion Tammara "Tamm" Thibeault to its roster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luke Littler was an unknown a year ago. Now he's making millions and taking darts into mainstream
item.description: Luke Littler was virtually unknown a year ago. Now he is making millions, transcending his sport and is searched for more often on Google than King Charles and the British Prime Minister.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams outlast 49ers with zero touchdowns scored in pivotal NFC West matchup
item.description: No one expected two of the best offenses in the league recently to put up no touchdowns in this game, but the Rams were able to outlast the 49ers doing so in this pivotal division game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers player refused to enter game when called on, Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter the game when Kyle Shanahan attempted to put him in on Thursday night, Shanahan said. Campbell instead went to the locker room. The incident happened in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Utah shuts down Colorado for fifth straight road victory
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is turning into a team of road warriors. Dylan Guenther scored two goals and an assist to give him a team-leading 12 goals on the season, while Karel Vejmelka made 22 saves, as Utah shut down the Colorado Avalanche Thursday night, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texas Rangers and RHP Nathan Eovaldi finalize $75 million, 3-year contract
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Nathan Eovaldi and the Texas Rangers finalized a $75 million, three-year contract Thursday that keeps him in their starting rotation.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UNLV hires former Florida and Mississippi State head coach Dan Mullen as its new football coach
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — UNLV is reaching into the Southeastern Conference to keep momentum going for its 24th-ranked football team, hiring former Florida and Mississippi State coach Dan Mullen on Thursday. He will be introduced in a news conference Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Crystal Mangum confesses to lying about being raped by Duke lacrosse players in 2006
item.description: Crystal Mangum confessed to lying about being raped by Duke Lacrosse players 16 years after starting a national controversy based on a lie.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC completes 2024 MLS Expansion Draft. Here is who they selected
item.description: San Diego FC's roster is starting to come together after taking part in the 2024 MLS Expansion Draft.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: With Dybantsa in the house, BYU blasts Fresno State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The highest rated recruit in BYU basketball history was at the Marriott Center Wednesday to watch his future team cruise to victory. AJ Dybantsa was witness to a 28-point drubbing by the Cougars over Fresno State, 95-67.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football
item.description: Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 coaching staff
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs announced its 2025 coaching staff Monday under the helm of second-year manager Craig Counsell. There are four new additions to his staff, including replacements for third base coach Willie Harris and first base coach Mike Napoli.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press. The deal could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Embiid scores 31 in his return, Maxey has his first triple-double, Sixers beat Bulls 108-100
item.description: Joel Embiid had 31 points and 12 rebounds in his return, Tyrese Maxey got his first career triple-double and the Philadelphia 76ers held on to beat the Chicago Bulls 108-100 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42
item.description: Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams had to pile up a veritable mountain of points, yards and time-of-possession advantage early on to give themselves even a chance against the Buffalo Bills' ferocious fourth-quarter rally and a historic six-touchdown performance by Josh Allen.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James misses 1st game this season, sidelined versus Portland due to left foot soreness
item.description: LeBron James will sit out Sunday's game against the Portland Trail Blazers due to left foot soreness, the NBA career scoring leader's first missed game of the season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Brayden Point's 4-point night leads the Lightning over the Canucks 4-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored twice and added two assists, and the Tampa Bay Lightning edged the Vancouver Canucks 4-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: Tagovailoa sealed it with a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime to help the Dolphins spoil Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years and beat the Jets for the ninth straight time in Miami.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU to play Colorado in Alamo Bowl December 28
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team will be taking on a fellow Big 12 team in a bowl game this season. #17 BYU and #23 Colorado both accepted invitations to play in the Alama Bowl December 28th in San Antonio. The game will be televised on ABC4 at 5:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: First 12-team College Football Playoff set, Oregon seeded No. 1 and SMU edges Alabama for last spot
item.description: The tournament starts Dec. 20-21 with four first-round games involving teams seeded 5-12. It concludes Jan. 20 with the national title game in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jokic's career high of 56 points comes during a low point for the Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Jokic scored a career-high 56 points and had little to celebrate afterward. It happened in a loss — to a team that hadn't won since October.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz cruise to rare blowout win over Portland, 141-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an extremely difficult rebuilding year, the Utah Jazz will relish nights like this one.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
